results.rendered_html:
pra-˚kopaṇa or pra-˚kopana, mf(ī)n. (fr. Caus.; cf.  Pāṇ. viii, 4, 31 , Sch.) exciting, irritating, provoking,  Suśr. ;
n. anything irritating, irritation,  ib. ;
provoking, exasperating, incensing,  MBh. ;  Hit.
